message:
🐛 Add PVC list modal and improve caching for Events/GitOps

- Add PVC list modal for Storage dashboard stats (PVCs, Bound, Pending)
- Implement module-level caching for Events stats (persists across navigation)
- Fix GitOps caching to properly handle cached data during fetch

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
